modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Notification of Windows Update due to malware infection received.

full_description_text:  
So, I got this notification saying my computer is infected with malware. It also mentioned something about an upgrade happening. I just submitted a ticket through the self-service form, and now I'm a bit confused about what's going on.
short_description: Notification of Windows Update due to malware infection received.
description: So, I got this notification saying my computer is infected with malware. It also mentioned something about an upgrade happening. I just submitted a ticket through the self-service form, and now I'm a bit confused about what's going on.
